summary.key_theme: 市場投資人正透過比較 Exelon 與同業 Consolidated Edison 的年度績效來評估其相對價值。

neutral.title: Has Exelon (EXC) Outpaced Other Utilities Stocks This Year? — Here is how Exelon (EXC) and Consolidated Edison (ED) have performed compared to their sector so far this year.
neutral.reason: 該報導僅為針對公用事業板塊內個股表現的比較分析，屬於市場數據回顧，並未涉及 Exelon 的營運變動或財務預測，因此對股價影響中性。
